The Challenge
Build & Run a Global AI Hackathon
from Scratch
🎯
Scale
320 shortlisted ideas, 180 prototype submissions from developers and AI engineers worldwide
⚙️
Complexity
Multi-vendor coordination: AWS, Hack2Skill, cross-functional teams across Engineering, Marketing, Brand & MarketingOps
⏱
Timeline
Tight turnaround from PRD sign-off to 3 days of final pitching and a live grand finale event
🎥
Production
Livestreamed finale on YouTube via Goldcast with zero technical glitches — even during a Chennai Red Alert
Cross-Functional Collaboration
5 Teams, 1 Mission
💻
Engineering
Problem statements, timeline planning, prototype review, deciding winning criteria
🎬
Marketing Video Production
Welcome video, founder video, AWS re:Invent footage, Winner Testimonial
🎨
Brand & Product
Hackathon messaging and product positioning
📨
MarketingOps
Email campaigns, shortlist comms, logistics, Streamyard platform dryruns
☁️
AWS Partnership
AWS credits, webinars on AWS services, Judges for pitching rounds
All coordinated by Jay Elango as End-to-End Event Lead
End-to-End Ownership
From PRD to Grand Finale
01
PLAN
• Vendor selection (H2S)
• PRD sign-off
• Timeline with Eng Head
• Judge coordination
02
BUILD
• AWS webinars
• Mentor-mentee groups
• Problem statement spaces
• Community architecture
03
EXECUTE
• 187 private groups
• Mentor-mentee sessions per participant
• 3-day pitching (Nov 25-27)
• Internal + AWS judges
04
FINALE
• Goldcast production
• YouTube livestream
• Pre-recorded videos
• 2 anchors, 11 winners
